greeting: Hi there! Welcome to Big Wave Mobile Grooming. I'm the virtual receptionist. What can we do for your pup today?

faq.q: Do you come to my house?
faq.a: Yes! We're a fully mobile grooming service — we come to you in Gilbert and the surrounding area.
Most full grooms take 1-2 hours depending on breed and coat condition.
We're based in Gilbert, Arizona. We serve the surrounding Phoenix-metro area.
We primarily specialize in dogs. Please call us at (480) 610-2385 to discuss your specific pet's needs.
Absolutely! With 166 reviews at 4.9 stars, Bill and the team are experienced with all breeds and sizes.
Call us at (480) 610-2385 or reach out through our website to schedule your mobile grooming appointment.

faq.q: What if my dog has matted fur?
faq.a: No problem! We handle matting during the grooming session. It may take a bit longer depending on severity.

escalation: Great question! Let me have Bill get back to you. Call us at (480) 610-2385.
